creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 217374
Update default version to 12

In order to keep up with the development and also satisfy some future requirements, we need to chance default version of PostgreSQL to 12.

This time the update should go way smoother than the last time, since nothing exception the version will chance. :D

So lets test this assumption and see what an exp-run will return.

Thank you very much!
